items.title: From loose intent to deterministic install
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR A[Manifest
loose constraints
openai>=1.40,<2] --> B[Resolver
solve compatible set] B --> C[Lockfile
exact versions + hashes
openai==1.40.3 ...] C --> D[Install
same set everywhere] D --> E[Dev] D --> F[CI] D --> G[Prod]
items.caption: The resolver turns loose intent into a pinned lockfile; every environment installs from the same lock, guaranteeing parity.
